text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
General consensus among the media and public is
that Seiun Sky is considered to be Special Week's
sole rival in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, I have come to a realization:
King Halo's true proficiency leans toward
sprinting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Faced with concerns over whether it was the right
decision to run in the long-distance Kikuka Sho,
King Halo nods silently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to be recognized as a first-rate
Umamusume, she must shine in the Classic Triple
Crown tour. Her face tells me that there's no
other option.
